item.title: It's time for another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
before flat screens this style tv was pretty much the best you could get
simultaneously the worst and best i've heard
i'm just gonna hold it
this from Dire Straits 'Money for Nothing' video (one of my favorite songs)
sounds good actually
mmmm... bite marks
haven't been to a waterpark in years. they are fun but also gross
ok
this meme was definitely necessary
mmm hmm
finally
i recommend shrooms
well, there he is
actually all riffs that i know of do have a start and an end
no one asked for this meme but here it is
what a show this was
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: I feel like 30 images is a good size for a dump
item.description:
I'm getting better at not doing this. It's ok to keep some things to myself.
These are my favorite jokes
I send these memes to my friends when their nervous dog sits on me.
Sad meep
My couple's therapist asked me to think of specific ways I want my husband to celebrate me on Mother's day and it's stressing me out. Last time I asked to be celebrated in a specific way he said it was "too much" and I just asked him to hang decorations I made and bake a cake I bought. That was also at the advice of a therapist.
What do you even do for Mother's day? My mom was out of the picture so idek what people do.
It's true
Ruh-roh
Where's the lie?
Cat tax! There are two of these little cardboard boats and they fight over one. The black one is Knight and the Siamese is Socks.
item.dc:creator: sesamestreetfighter

item.dc:creator: ubermonkey21

item.title: One of my most prized possessions, my Bender’s Head Futurama collection, signed by about half the main cast so far.
item.description:
So far I have John DiMaggio, Tress MacNeille, Phill LaMarr & Maurice LaMarche. Just missing Katey Segal, Billy West, Lauren Tom & David Herman. (I’d love to add David X. Cohen & Matt Groening as well)
“Bite my shiny metal ass!” - John DiMaggio as ‘Bender’
“Jam a bastard in it, you crap!” - Tress MacNeille as ‘Mom’
“… sigh…” - Maurice LaMarche as ‘Kif’
“My Manwich!” - Phil LaMarr as ‘Hermes’
Bonus directions left by Bender just in case the meat bags have trouble finding his ass.
item.dc:creator: morningxafter

item.title: Does that burn? I bet that burns.
item.dc:creator: PatThaiCM

item.title: I went to an abandoned village for a Fallout themed Cosplay Photoshoot
item.description:
This was one of the coolest experiences I've had. I went to an abandoned village for a Fallout themed cosplay photoshoot. I cosplayed the Sole Survivor and a Deathclaw Hunter. A can even randomly showed up! It was super rainy and cold when we did the shoot but worth the adventure! Cosplays and props by me (Mangoloo Cosplays) Photography by ClubJimay
CatMeat
item.dc:creator: Mangoloo

item.title: Always remember Aitzaz Hassan Bangash Shaheed
item.description: Pakistan will always remember Aitzaz Hassan Bangash Shaheed, the 15 year old who tackled a suicide bomber, sacrificing himself to save so many others. This is to honor Aitzaz. (originally posted by @maureoko on 2023-04-13 08:28:30)

item.title: Don't Wait
item.description: Edit: resource on finding trusted partners via IRS https://apps.irs.gov/app/freeFile/browse-all-offers/ https://www.freetaxusa.com has a good UI and easy steps. Would highly recommend, as of 2024. Generally, the closer to $0 you get on your return, the better. If you got a big refund, you overpaid, but some do it intentionally for a kind of forced savings account-ish. (Correct me if I'm wrong here)

item.dc:creator: dermai

item.title: Change is scary
item.description:
Do not want to put in too much information. Going to be working a normal shift now with a pay raise.
Gave work a 3 week notice, they walked me out after week and a half, was half expecting, half not expecting. But getting payed out for 2 full weeks and all my PTO and other time off going to be payed out.
Big change, with change comes questions and unknowns. It is a positive step in the right direction. Still not comfortable till start new job and get some more answers on what is going on.
Family and friends to talk to and hang out with to distract me until i start my new job. Change was needed and expected. Now that is happing second guessing myself if i should have rode it out. Now have 4 days off till new job starts. Playing video games (halo 5 1st play through currently), cleaning and preping my motorcycle for the season, getting garden set up, and going to get this seasons mead started. Thank you for reading. TLDR, new job, am scared, waiting till starts, distracting myself.
item.dc:creator: Reaperkul
